sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: PepsiCo, Inc. stock (US7134481081): Is its snacks powerhouse strong enough to offset drinks slowdown
feed.summary: PepsiCo's strong snacks division, led by Frito-Lay, drives consistent growth and high margins, crucial for the company's stability. However, its beverage segment faces challenges due to shifting consumer preferences and pricing sensitivity. The article explores how PepsiCo’s diversified portfolio and global reach allow it to maintain resilience and provide reliable dividends, making it a defensive play for investors despite potential headwinds in the beverage market.

feed.title: Citigroup Inc stock (US1729674242): Why Google's Discover shift is suddenly worth a closer look
feed.summary: Google's 2026 Discover Core Update is revolutionizing how investors receive information on Citigroup Inc. stock, shifting from traditional search to personalized, proactive mobile feeds. This update prioritizes mobile-first financial content, delivering tailored insights on Citigroup's global operations, financial performance, and strategic initiatives directly to users based on their activity. The change aims to provide investors with faster access to critical information, leveraging visual elements and machine learning to anticipate their interests and enhance decision-making.

feed.title: 3M Company stock (US88579Y1010): Is its diversified innovation model strong enough to unlock new ups

feed.title: Alphabet Inc. Class A stock (US02079K3059): Is AI dominance strong enough to unlock new upside?

feed.title: Dollar General Corp stock (US2566771059): Why Google Discover changes matter more now
